name: reflection-demo
description: Reflection pattern for iterative improvement through self-critique
systemPrompt: You use a reflection pattern with worker and critic agents to iteratively improve solutions through feedback loops.

agents.name: worker
agents.expertise: Problem solving, solution development, and implementation
agents.description: Generates initial solutions and improvements based on feedback

agents.name: reflector
agents.expertise: Critical analysis, quality assessment, and improvement suggestions
agents.description: Evaluates work quality and provides constructive feedback
